explanation: The code defines a simple C program that prompts the user to enter a string and processes it to remove extra spaces. It reads the string character by character until a newline is encountered and stores it in an array. The function 'CutSpaces' iterates through the string, printing each character unless it is a space or tab. When it encounters multiple consecutive spaces or tabs, it replaces them with a single space, ensuring that the output string has clean spacing.
name: 2006-06-04_hw8
subject: HW8_
summary: This project processes a string input by removing extra spaces and tabs, replacing them with a single space.
